JUDGE MCCARTHY CLERK: SUE ELLEN SMITH CSR: MITCH LYON. JURY TRIAL CLOSING ARGUMENTS. JURY DELIBERATES AND RETURNED A VERDICT OF $25,000 ECONOMIC DAMAGES (AWARDED SOLELY ON NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION) IN FAVOR OF ARLENE WAGNER AND $75,000 NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES (AWARDED 50% FOR INT. INF. OF EMOT. DISTRESS; AND 50% FOR NUISANCE) IN FAVOR OF ARLENE WAGNER. JURY ALSO FOUND ARLENE WAGNER 5% CONTRIBUTORILY NEGLIGENT, WHICH SHOULD REDUCE THE ECONOMIC DAMAGES ACCORDINGLY. THE JURY DID NOT FIND PUNITIVE DAMAGES. DEFENSE COUNSEL REQUESTED AND WAS GRANTED A 25 DAY STAY OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. COUNSEL TO APPEAR BEFORE JUDGE MCCARTHY IN DEPT. 306 ON FRIDAY, 2/21/03 @ 9AM FOR ANY POST-TRIAL MOTIONS.
